overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through the rain-soaked Vista del Rey district. The player moves along elevated walkways and crosses neon-lit streets beneath towering digital billboards and futuristic architecture, ending at a graffiti-covered stairway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with overhead billboards

events.description: exits the covered walkway structure into open air

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated orange walkway beneath the covered structure

notable_agents.action: person with umbrella walking ahead on the walkway

entered.detail: overhead curved metal structure with orange neon strip lighting
diamond-plate metal walkway with orange-yellow coloring
large illuminated advertisement showing noodle dish
safety railings along the left edge of the walkway
green triangular district sign with white text

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a covered pedestrian walkway with distinctive orange metal plating underfoot. Overhead digital billboards illuminate the rain-slicked path while the camera follows a pedestrian with an umbrella. The covered structure provides shelter from the light rain until the exit into open air at the end of the segment.

events.description: crossing the multi-lane street at the crosswalk while vehicles wait

agents.ego_description: walking across the wet intersection crosswalk with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: black car driving past on the wet road

entered.detail: rain-slicked multi-lane street reflecting neon lights
large vertical billboard with neon signage and character image
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings
tall glass and steel structures with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: Moving from the covered walkway into the open street, the scene reveals a wide cyberpunk intersection with wet asphalt reflecting neon advertisements. The camera crosses the street alongside other pedestrians while the iconic 'El Coyote Cojo' billboard dominates the left skyline. Vehicles pass by on the rain-slicked roads as the walk continues toward the opposite sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: street with protest graffiti and stairway entrance

events.description: approaching concrete stairway with prominent anti-corporate graffiti

agents.ego_description: walking toward a stairway entrance while passing a homeless encampment

notable_agents.action: homeless person sitting in folding chair next to burning barrel

entered.detail: concrete wall with red and black spray-painted text reading 'CORPORATEYES MUST DIE'
wide concrete stairs leading up to building entrance
makeshift shelter with cardboard, chair, and burning barrel
orange and white striped barricades along the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows the sidewalk past towering digital billboards toward a concrete stairway marked by provocative anti-corporate graffiti. A homeless encampment with a burning barrel occupies the corner near the stairs, where a person sits in a folding chair. The rain continues to fall on the wet pavement as the camera approaches the stairway entrance, ending the walk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered pedestrian corridor into the rain-drenched openness of a neon-lit cyberpunk intersection. It begins on a covered walkway with orange metal plating, following a pedestrian with an umbrella beneath glowing digital billboards. As the camera exits the shelter, the scene opens into a wide street where wet asphalt reflects vibrant advertisements and the towering El Coyote Cojo billboard dominates the skyline. The movement then shifts toward the opposite sidewalk, passing through the flow of traffic and pedestrians before turning toward a concrete stairway. Finally, the path leads past a homeless encampment with a burning barrel and provocative anti-corporate graffiti, ending as the camera approaches the rain-slicked stairs.
